svg.title: Observer-Patch Holography Full Derivation DAG
svg.desc: A paper-grounded end-state map for a completed OPH theory-of-everything, rendered in Pragma corporate design.

g.text: A paper-grounded end-state map for a completed OPH theory-of-everything, rendered in Pragma corporate design.
Top: axioms and bridge packages. Middle: derivation spine. Bottom: branch completions and global closure.
Core implementation constants currently used in quantitative branches.
Ongoing work aims to discharge and remove these extra assumptions.
Global closure is the self-creating branch: why anything exists at all, why the universe has the shape it has, and why observers exist.
objective law from unique normal form
cap modular flow locks to geometric dilation
GR recovered up to Lambda g_ab
compact gauge group from overlap structure
SU(3) x SU(2) x U(1) route
massless photon / graviton, charge quantization, proton stability
p_R(t) proportional to d_R exp(-t C2(R))
gauge couplings, alpha_em, sin^2 theta_W, v
calibration surface from P and printed
the current recovered-core public paper set
until their constructive closure is ready
kept off the current public surface
effective dark response from modular anomaly
capacity anchor, family response, asymmetry mechanisms
discrete horizon comb, BH information, area / entropy branch
edge heat-kernel branch matches 2D YM form
Modular Sewing and Higher Gauge Slot
anomaly cancellation and full massless spectrum
internal self-map on the OPH habitat
fixed-point stability of the closure dynamics
QM, GR, SM structure, cosmology, string theory
why anything exists, why the universe has this shape,
Rose completion nodes are planned closure results for completed OPH. Cyan and blue nodes are theorem/output structure already articulated in the paper set.
